issue.author: futog
issue.body:
Configuration:
 --target=armv7a-none-eabihf -march=v7-a -mthumb -mfloat-abi=hard -mfpu=neon -O3

In vectorize.c:
  var_27 will be set to '1', which is not correct.

The reason is that in BasicBlock for.cond.for.cond.cleanup_crit_edge (pred is middle.block) the arr_14 array is overindexed.

I think that the problem is that tail-fold by masking happens, even though the loop induction variable is used outside of the loop.

[vectorize.zip](https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/files/13729421/vectorize.zip)
issue.title: [clang][LoopVectorize] Inccorrect code generation in case of vectorize_predicate(enable)

tests.test_body:
define i32 @test(ptr %arr, i64 %n) {
entry:
  %cmp1 = icmp ugt i64 %n, 1
  br i1 %cmp1, label %preheader, label %done

preheader:                                        ; preds = %entry
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %preheader
  %conv = phi i64 [ %conv2, %loop ], [ 1, %preheader ]
  %i = phi i8 [ %inc, %loop ], [ 1, %preheader ]
  %sub = add nsw i64 %conv, -1
  %ptr = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %arr, i64 %sub
  store i32 65, ptr %ptr, align 4
  %inc = add i8 %i, 1
  %conv2 = zext i8 %inc to i64
  %cmp2 = icmp ult i64 %conv2, %n
  br i1 %cmp2, label %loop, label %load_val, !llvm.loop !0

load_val:                                         ; preds = %loop
  %final = phi i64 [ %conv, %loop ]
  %ptr2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %arr, i64 %final
  %val = load i32, ptr %ptr2, align 4
  br label %done

done:                                             ; preds = %load_val, %entry
  %value = phi i32 [ %val, %load_val ], [ 0, %entry ]
  ret i32 %value
}

!0 = distinct !{!0, !1, !2, !3}
!1 = !{!"llvm.loop.unroll.disable"}
!2 = !{!"llvm.loop.vectorize.predicate.enable", i1 true}
!3 = !{!"llvm.loop.vectorize.enable", i1 true}
